mission.title: chaos-mesh: refactor: dashboard homepage and some visible changes
mission.description:
### What problem does this PR solve?

This PR introduces several changes (from #1283) that will be effected in `v1.1.0`:

- [x] (refactor) Make the homepage more like a dashboard
- [x] (feat) Tourist Guide on home page
- [x] (feat) Predefined experiments (Can be store in the IndexedDB)
- [x] (chore) Security Mode support in UI
- [x] (feat) Download experiment YAML definition (Resolve #1115)
- [x] (feat) Embed Swagger API
- [x] (chore) Delete archive experiments by UI interface #1272

And also, this PR has some minor bug fixes:

- Can't view `DNSChaos` archives
- Repeatedly request `chaos-available-namespaces`
- Some bug fixes
- Styles optimized

Some extra fixes were open below. When it's merged in master. Some functions will work as normal.

- #1261
- #1323

### What is changed and how does it work?

In addition to the above changes, the dashboard UI has a layout change to adapt the recent features.

### Checklist

Tests

- [ ] Unit test
- [ ] E2E test
- [x] Manual test (add detailed
